changelog: FIX: Auto-login now survives app updates again. v1.44.96 / v1.44.97 unintentionally rotated the internal class names used to deserialize the stored Xtream credentials, which forced everyone to log back in. Tightened the proguard rules so the JSON-deserialization path is stable across releases.
Side benefit: the fix doesn't undo the speedups — APK is still 13 MB, cold start is still as fast as v1.44.97.
